Plaintiff Trust Deed Investments, Inc.'S Order To Show Cause Re Confirmation Of Appointment Of Receiver And Issuance Of Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Trust Deed Investments, Inc.'s Order to Show Cause, regarding confirmation of appointment of receiver, and issuance of preliminary injunction (per ex parte order of March 10, 2009). Appearances: Sara M. Taylor, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415) 412-8538, Special Appearance for Plaintiff; There are no other appearances. Counsel is appearing to have Order signed. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order confirming appointment of Receiver and Preliminary Injunction signed in Open Court. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759
